summary: W827 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and changes BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory from arbitrary readiness predicates into concrete categorical structure on Dbounded. The remaining task-4 blocker is the missing nullary or typeclass-resolved original four-task completion witness.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not yet contract-complete: BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory now requires concrete Dbounded stable fields, but the target still lacks a no-argument witness assembling them for MetrizableLCA.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still lack an original four-task completion witness.
The review packet does not yet contain the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit required for completion.
remaining_gaps: Task 4 is not yet contract-complete: BoundedDerivedInfinityCategory now requires concrete Dbounded stable fields, but the target still lacks a no-argument witness assembling them for MetrizableLCA.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still lack an original four-task completion witness.
The review packet does not yet contain the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit required for completion.
remaining_work: Construct the concrete stable Dbounded fields from the actual bounded localization and expose them through a no-argument or typeclass-resolved original four-task completion witness.
Make ProductSuccessDeclarations or OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations check that original four-task completion witness instead of only checking public names.
Refresh the review packet with contract-specific negative fixtures, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit before any future product-success claim.
